channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Summer TA Hours
item.description: Wednesdays : 3-8pm (Ballroom, Student Union) Need some support with your summer classes? Drop by your TA’s office hours in the Student Union for extra help, then recharge with fun mental floss activities from the Center of Gravity! View the full schedule here: https://successcenter.rpi.edu/tutoring
item.author: Students

item.title: Join us! Kim Gardner’s Retirement Celebration (RSVP)
item.description: Date: Wednesday, June 24, 2026 3:00 PM - 5:00 PM - After 26 years of dedicated service to RPI, Kimberly Joy Gardner, Director of Operations (EMPAC), will be retiring at the end of June. Please join us in celebrating Kim’s career and wishing her well in retirement. Light refreshments and cake provided as we gather with campus friends to recognize Kim and all she has contributed to EMPAC and the RPI community. We hope you can join us! Kindly RSVP: https://webforms.rpi.edu/form/kim-gardner…
item.author: Community

item.title: RPI MAX Annual Performance Evaluations - Join HR Virtual Office Hours
item.description:
Human Resources invites managers and staff to attend upcoming Virtual HR Office Hours to answer questions regarding the RPI MAX Annual Staff Performance Evaluation process. Stop in for help with PageUp navigation, the evaluation process, timelines, and related topics. We look forward to connecting with you!

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
